notes: Tracker re-fun pass: personality restored across 13 trackers (Potty Talk, Skull Says No, Owie HQ, Brain Weather, Autonomic Shenanigans, Heart Drama, Joint Shenanigans, Brain Fog HQ, Food Drama, Mind & Mood, Mind, Mental Health overview, Coping & Regulation). The Gremlin Detection severity scale is back on bathroom (None = No Gremlin Detected → WHY = BUTT WHY!!). Bristol scale gets its flavor labels back (Type 4 = Smooth sausage / Goldilocks zone). All medical fields, red-flag detection, and PDF mappings unchanged — labels only. Joint/MSK gains four first-class muscle-symptom episode types: Weakness (HMSN/polymyositis/myopathy/anti-synthetase), Cramping (acute painful spasms), Fasciculations (visible twitching / motor neuron involvement), and Muscle Tightness (the 'massage therapists give up' kind of sustained hypertonicity). Bug fix: Dysautonomia tracker subtitle no longer mentions POTS specifically — orthostatic chaos and autonomic episodes without claiming a dx the user may not have.
